g.inkscape:label: 99 metadata
g.text: LAST NIGHT pedal panel v5.0 hybrid — 203×140mm (big-box, Strymon BigSky / Eventide H9 Max class)
Hybrid lock — Decision 09. Mockup canon: TAP/CRUSH/BYPASS/FREEZE footswitches, NOISE+COLOR(geiger) 2 knobs, Phase row, Shape Form slider.
TOLL/STALL — CV-only triggers (Row B patch bay), solenoid double-function preserved electrically.
